violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 10/16/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

The concentration of the sanitizer solution for the wet wiping cloths was under 100 parts per million (ppm). The required concentration for quaternary ammonium sanitizer is 200 ppm. PIC disposed of sanitizer and refilled sani bucket to proper concentration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water with diluted sanitizer between uses. PIC brought utensils to be cleaned and sanitized. Inspector discussed options for storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

A hose is connected to the faucet at the mop sink. This faucet is lacking a backflow prevention device. An approved backflow prevention device is required in order to prevent backflow of a solid, liquid, or gas contaminant into the water supply at each point of use at a food establishment. Hose was disconnected during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2025

Inari packaged in the food establishment are lacking complete information. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients (including sub ingredients), the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2024

Establishment currently has a 20 gallon hot water tank. Hot water was temping at 98 degrees Fahrenheit. Proper adjustments to be made to meet demands of hot water usage. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
Pipe in basement observed leaking. Plumbing systems to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2024
